feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Code
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Code Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CAP: $count=true returning 0 as the amount although the results are not empty
entry.content:
Hello CAP Experts,

I was creating a basic CAP task list application within the SAP Build Code which works out of the box. Now, I wanted to add a service that only returns the user's tasks. While the basic services/entities are returning the correct amount, my custom service is returning the correct entities in the value but the "@odata.count" is 0. 

This is what is being returned for my current user:

  "@odata.context": "$metadata#UserTasks",
  "@odata.count": 0,
  "value": [
    {
      "ID": "a82f72e9-4ef4-4bed-8aae-60995e5effc0",
      "doneDateTime": null,
      "status": "Open",
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Restock shelves"
    },
    {
      "ID": "1fb9b006-11f9-42b7-b6fc-8f6a57076e63",
      "doneDateTime": null,
      "status": "Open",
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Inventory check"
    },
    {
      "ID": "8d84f9d7-6b62-4e55-8ad1-2dc77390afcb",
      "doneDateTime": "2021-07-01T10:00:00Z",
      "status": "Done,
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Staff training"
    }
  ]
}

  As you can see, the "@odata.count" is 0 although there are multiple entries. Here is my service.cds and service.js:

@Path : '/service/taskapp'
service taskappSrv
{
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity GenericTasks as
        projection on my.GenericTasks;

    entity UserTasks as projection on my.Tasks {
        *,
        genericTask.description as taskDescription
    };

    entity OpenTasks as 
        projection on my.Tasks
        where status = 'Open';

    @CDS.redirection.target : 'Tasks'
    entity Tasks as
        projection on my.Tasks;
}

UserTasks is the service that is being requested. Here is my custom logic:

module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function () {
  const { UserTasks } = this.entities;

  this.on('READ', 'UserTasks', async (req) => {
    const userMail = req.headers["x-username"];

    console.log('Requested userMail', userMail);

    if (!userMail) {
      req.error(400, 'Parameter "userMail" ist erforderlich');
      return;
    }

    const tasks = await SELECT.from(UserTasks)
      .columns('ID', 'doneDateTime', 'status', 'userMail', 'taskDescription')
      .where({ userMail: userMail });

    console.log('Filtered tasks with description:', tasks);

    return tasks;
  });
});

It is returning and logging the tasks correctly, however my only problem is that the "@odata.count" is 0 in the final response and I don't find any way to change it. The URL that is requested:

/service/taskapp/UserTasks?$count=true

Another thread had the same problem but as I was using the newer version, I am already using oData v4. Also, in the documentation I could not find a workaround for this.

Best regards

entry.title: CAP Build Code & Joule project deployment to CF
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to deploy my CAP project (named cap_bc) created using SAP Build code and Joule to SAP BTP subaccount/space. I added mta.yml file using command "cds add mta" and manifest.json file is already there in "webapp" folder. Deployment is also almost successful but at the end I am getting error related to metadata as below -

"Application "cap_bc-srv" started and available at "f*******trial-dev-cap-bc-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com"
Skipping deletion of services, because the command line option "--delete-services" is not specified.
Process finished.

Use "cf dmol -i 1f04c7e0-6111-11ef-9e05-eeee0a8230ab" to download the logs of the process.
cf update-user-provided-service cap_bc-metadata -t "DeployedUTCTime: 2024-08-23T05:33:53.331Z"
Updating user provided service cap_bc-metadata in org f0*****trial / space dev as s************1@gmail.com...
Service instance 'cap_bc-metadata' not found
FAILED
Exit error code: 1 "
 
I do not see any user provided service and anything like "cap_bc-metadata" in my mta.yml/ package.json files. I am attaching my mta.yml & package.json files also.
 
Further, is there any other way to deploy Build Code project? I am trying to deploy in regular way mostly manually by adding mta yml files etc. Kindly guide me with the steps.
 
Thanks in advance.
- Saurabh

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: in my recently developed apps on sap build apps,I am having to refresh page to view effect.help?
entry.content: in my recently developed apps on sap build apps,I am having to refresh page to view effect.help?Every time I am upadating a field  in navigated page then I will have to comeback to main page to view it.It is supposed to show data automaticatically but I am having to refresh the page here. Need help..Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How we connect SAP Build Apps with PostgreSQL.
entry.content: I am created an application with SAP Build App. But, I don't know how to connect SAP Build App with PostgreSQL.

entry.title: Database explorer, failed generating SQL based on prompt
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm trying to use the new genAI feature in SAP Build Code Database Explorer to generate SQL based on prompt.

What ever the prompt, I'm always getting the following error: "Unable to generate the SQL statement. Error from LLM: Failed to get embeddings. Try rephrasing the prompt."

entry.title: How we can filter Odata data in SAP BUILD APP.
entry.content:
I got data in SAP BUILD APP with Odata URL. But now I want to know how we can filter only selected
data (UserID, Employee Name) in SAP BUILD APP.

entry.title: Not able to upload Attachmnet in SAP AI Joule
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am trying to upload Attachment on SAP AI Joule but it shows File type not supported.the only diffrece I show they are using VS Code and I am trying on Business Application Studio. I also try that in VS Code but I did not Found any Extention Related AI Joule.
For refrence I used  this you tube video.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gfRzw8nRVCU
And here below I shared the Screen Shot of BAS error which I get.

entry.title: SAP Build is ignoring the annotations of the CDS view
entry.content:
I have a custom CDS view in S/4 with UI annotations. In SAP Build Code, I tried creating a list page as a SAP Fiori application, and a Full-Stack application. In both cases the application ignores the UI annotations.

I have access to another subaccount that does not have SAP Build, and there I can create a list page that does not ignore the UI annotations of the CDS view.

Is this an issue with SAP Build Code, or is there some action I need to undertake or a setting to adjust?

entry.title: [cds] - Error: Forbidden while starting cap application due to user lacks "support" role.
entry.content:
Getting below error while starting cap application given in the golden path of capire. 

https://pages.github.tools.sap/cap/golden-path/develop/btp-app-create-ui-fiori-elements/start-application#next-steps

Help me where should add this role ? and what user it is asking for ?is it my BTP sub account/S4Hana DB user ?

what password I should enter in the popup like shown in the image..

[cds] - Error: Forbidden
at requires_check (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/protocols/http.js:54:32)
at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
at trim_prefix (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:328:13)
at /home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:286:9
at Function.process_params (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:346:12)
at next (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:280:10)
at http_log (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/protocols/http.js:42:59)
at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
at trim_prefix (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:328:13)
at /home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:286:9 {
code: 403,
reason: "User 'siva.sankar.reddy.indireddy@sap.com' is lacking required roles: [support]",
user: User { id: 'siva.sankar.reddy.indireddy@sap.com', roles: {} },
required: [ 'support' ]

entry.title: Joule Hana modeling assistant not working in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm trying to use the new Joule HANA modeling assistant (see https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-modeling-guide-for-sap-business-application-studio/get-answers-to-modeling-questions ) but I'm getting the following error:

"Command 'SAP HANA Modeling: Modeling Help (Joule)' resulted in an error
command 'extension.joule.genie.modeling-help.show' not found"
Do I have to add an extension to my SAP Build Code workspace ?

entry.title: How to fetch the document from Document Management Service using API's in SAP CAP application?
entry.content:
We have a PDF's which are stored in BTP Document Management Service in which we are using the API https://api.sap.com/api/DownloadFileApi/tryout to read the contents of the PDF.

The output/result on querying DMS to the service returns the result in gibberish manner. As shown below 

 

 

The requirement is to have the output in human readable format which we again need to pass to GenAI for further processing. Could you please help/guide us how can we have the results in human readable text/string. Unfortunately, we tried node.js libraries to parse the query result content but were unsuccessful doing so.

Can anyone suggest how to resolve this?

entry.title: how to manage user authentication in sap build code?
entry.content:
I am working on SAP Build Code and need some clarification regarding user authentication and role-based access control. Specifically, I have the following two questions:

  1. Is it possible to restrict access to specific columns in a table based on user roles? For example, if I have a "salaries" column, can I make it so that only users with a "Manager" role can see this column, while users with a "Viewer" role cannot?

  2. Regarding action buttons, if a user has a "Read Only" role, I understand that they will receive a "Forbidden" message when attempting actions like delete or create. Is there a way to dynamically hide these action buttons (e.g., "Delete" or "Create") for users with "Read Only" access, so they don't even appear on the UI?

Looking forward to your insights.

entry.title: Can't find process and workflows tile in the monitoring section
entry.content: In SAP Build Code, Under the Monitoring Section I am unable to find the tile Processes and workflow tile

entry.title: How to retrieve context of multiple instances in 1 Page Variable of SAP Build app
entry.content:
Issue:

I need to save the entire context of multiple instances in a single Page Variable, but I'm unsure how to implement a loop in the SAP Build app.

Scenario:

I have two Data Variables for the Workflow API: sapWorkflow and WorkflowInstance. The sapWorkflow variable fetches all "InProgress" workflows, while WorkflowInstance retrieves the context of a specific workflow selected by the user on the selection screen (fetched from sapWorkflow).

The filter conditions at the top of the page contain attributes that exist at the context level (i.e., the WorkflowInstance level). Therefore, I need to store the context of all fetched InProgress workflows into a single Page Variable to apply filters. 

Could you please suggest how to retrieve Context of multiple instance in 1 page variable

entry.title: sap build code authorization error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '$count')
entry.content:
I am working on a CAP (Cloud Application Programming) model where I have an entity called booksService.books, and I am applying role-based access control to filter certain fields based on user roles.

entity books {
key ID : UUID;
title : String;
author : String;
Sales : Integer;
Price : Integer;
} 

User Roles and Their Permissions:

  • AdminAll → Can see all data
  • viewExSales → Can see all fields except sales 

I initially wrote this event handler to modify the query when a user has the "viewExSales" role, so they cannot see the Sales column:

 

/**
 * 
 * @On(event = { "READ" }, entity = "booksService.books")
 * @Param {Object} request - User information, tenant-specific CDS model, headers, and query parameters
 */
module.exports = async function (request) {
    if (request.user.is('viewExSales')) {
        // Remove the 'Sales' column from the query
        request.query.columns = request.query.columns.filter(column => column !== 'Sales');
    }
};

 

 i get error

 

[cds] - ❗️Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '$count')
    at all (/home/user/projects/books/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/fiori/lean-draft.js:982:80)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
    at async cds.ApplicationService.handle (/home/user/projects/books/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/fiori/lean-draft.js:447:20)

 

So, I also tried implementing manual query filtering based on roles like this

 

module.exports = async function(request) {
    const { books } = cds.entities;
    const user = request.user;
    
    let columns = ['ID', 'title', 'author', 'Sales', 'Price'];

    if (user) {
        const userRoles = Array.isArray(user.roles) ? user.roles : Object.keys(user.roles);

        if (userRoles.includes('AdminAll')) {
            return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
        } 
        
        if (userRoles.includes('viewExSales')) {
            columns = columns.filter(col => col !== 'Sales');
        }

        return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
    } 

    return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
};

 

it works and returned the data correctly but there were issues in it

Issue:

  1. Filters and searches applied via the generated Fiori UI are ignored.
  • If I filter by title or author, the backend still returns the full dataset instead of the filtered results.
  • It seems like my custom query is overriding the default behavior of CAP filtering.

entry.title: SAP Build App Integration Issue with BTP Destination
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am facing an issue while integrating an SAP BTP destination with an SAP Build App. I have created a destination on SAP BTP and attempted to integrate it into my SAP Build App to fetch data entities. However, I encountered a "Connection Failed" error during the integration process.

Interestingly, when I review the data using SAP Build Code, I can see the entity details without any issues.

I suspect that the root cause of this issue is related to Additional Properties in the SAP BTP destination configuration, but I am not sure which properties need to be added or modified to resolve this issue.

Has anyone faced a similar issue? How can I resolve this connection failure in SAP Build App while the data is accessible in SAP Build Code?

entry.title: SAP Build Code application deployment error
entry.content:
Dear Community members,

I am trying to deploy application in build code and to see it in Work zone, can i get help to understand the below error on why my deployment is getting failed, i have signed in to my cloud foundry account as well

Appretiate your support

entry.title: HTTP Error 403 When Trying to Open Application in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

I am reaching out regarding an issue I'm facing with SAP Build Apps. Every time I attempt to open my application, I am encountering an HTTP Error 403, which prevents the application from loading. This error seems to occur consistently, regardless of the time or the device I am using.

Could you kindly investigate this issue and provide guidance on how to resolve it? I would appreciate any troubleshooting steps, or if there is a configuration that I may need to adjust in order to gain access.

Looking forward to your assistance.

 

Thank you in advance!
